_comment: Copy this file to config/{client-slug}/flow-smoke-basic.json within the skill folder
_comment2: For full E2E checkout copy to config/{client-slug}/flow-full-checkout.json and set boundary: full_checkout

_boundary_options: stop_at_render — smoke test only: verify payment fields render, do NOT submit
full_checkout  — E2E test: complete the order using Stripe test card
payment_sandbox.note: Do not click Pay or submit any payment form unless boundary is full_checkout.

test_card.note: Stripe universal test card. Always approves in test mode.

qa_persona._note: Required for full_checkout boundary. Used for billing/account fields.

critical_flows.name: Example: Product Checkout
steps: Add a product to the cart
Navigate to cart and verify correct total
Proceed to checkout and verify payment fields render (sandbox)
fail_criteria: live payment gateway detected (no test mode badge)
